title: MNC Sales Account Manager (BASIC + COMMISSION)
description:
Job Description

  • Explore new business opportunities with non-Japanese companies
  • Evaluate and define key target market and trends
  • Research target market requirements, by establishing the key business drivers, determining obstacles and identifying the key competitions
  • Insight on target market penetration strategies a with short, medium and long-term plans
  • Identify new potential clients in the target markets and Leveraging on KDDI value proposition
  • Understanding business divers, business strategic objectives, internal investment areas and key stakeholders to inform the client account strategies
  • Contribute best practice business models to be used for different target market segment
  • Understanding Market proposition develop sales strategy, identify target customers and derive actions list to meet personal and company objectives.

Requirement

  • Experience in exploring new Market, building up validated leads with commitment in deal closure is a must
  • Experience working on Network/ Infra/ Security etc and related deals with relevant Certificates and experience will advantage
  • Proven client engagement and consulting experience coupled with solid experience
  • Experience in developing IT strategy and a track record of at least 1 transformational engagements within the IT industry
  • Knowledge and understanding of Market trend and industry and technologies
  • Strong sales presentation, communication, and closing skills
  • Min 5 years of sales experience in SI (System Integrator) environment or related.
  • Knowledge in solution selling and generate new business with new/ existing clients
  • Good understanding on relevant technologies and applications
  • Strong communication skills (verbal and written)

postedCompany.description:
KDDI Asia Pacific Pte Ltd is a 100% subsidiary company of KDDI Corporation. KDDI Corporation is information and Communications Company as a one-stop provider of all communication services from fixed to mobile. As the Regional Head Quarter of KDDI Group in Southeast Asia, KDDI Asia Pacific Pte Ltd provides comprehensive global and local communication services to companies developing their businesses in the region including Singapore, by tailoring services according to the characteristics of each region.

From international network services to LAN or one unit of PC in the customer’s office, KDDI Asia Pacific Pte Ltd offers a wide range of detailed services according to customer’s needs.
postedCompany.name: KDDI ASIA PACIFIC PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
